svg.text: INVARIANT · HOLD / ESTOP / CONFIG-FAIL-CLOSED all emit a ZEROED frame — fail-safe to zero, NOT latch-last. ESTOP latches until reset(); CONFIG-FAIL-CLOSED is permanent (safety_ok=false).
